title: Charred Smoky Ukrainian Meat Kebabs
description: These Ukrainian meat kebabs are marinated in a sweet and tangy pomegranate molasses mixture, then grilled to perfection for a charred, gooey texture.
instructions: Using a meat thermometer, cook the pork shoulder to 63°C, then set aside to cool. Cut into 2.5cm cubes.
Cut the beef striploin into 2.5cm cubes.
In a large bowl, whisk together pomegranate molasses, olive oil, garlic, thyme, rosemary, sea salt, and black pepper.
Add the pork and beef cubes to the marinade, and mix to coat.
Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or overnight.
Preheat a sous vide water bath to 60°C.
Place the marinated meat cubes in a sous vide bag, and seal.
Cook the meat in the sous vide water bath for 4 hours.
Preheat a grill to high heat.
Thread the cooked meat cubes onto skewers, leaving a 2.5cm space between each cube.
Grill the kebabs for 2-3 minutes per side, or until charred and slightly caramelized.
